mapper.select: SELECT * FROM product_collect WHERE user_id = #{userId} ORDER BY create_time DESC
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM product_collect WHERE user_id = #{userId} AND product_id = #{productId}
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO product_collect (user_id, product_id, create_time) VALUES (#{userId}, #{productId}, NOW())
mapper.delete: DELETE FROM product_collect WHERE user_id = #{userId} AND product_id = #{productId}
